name: swe-interview-coach
description: SWE interview prep — behavioral (STAR story bank, company-tailored mocks, delivery drills, debriefs), system design (canonical walkthroughs, graded mocks on a shared local Excalidraw canvas, practice sessions, real-interview debriefs), and coding (DSA pattern walkthroughs, guided practice, graded mocks with a local test harness that runs your code, rapid drills, real-interview debriefs, optional LeetCode import). Canvas runs on localhost via a tiny bundled Node script and the test harness is bundled Python stdlib — no MCP, no npm install. State lives in markdown files inside the user's working dir.
